# PCPartDeals

PCPartDeals is a European used PC parts discovery and marketplace aggregation website. It helps users find second-hand GPUs, CPUs, RAM, motherboards, gaming PCs, HDDs, SSDs and other computer components across supported European marketplaces.

Supported listing sources may include Vinted, Kleinanzeigen, Leboncoin, Wallapop, Yaga, Osta and eBay where available. PCPartDeals primarily helps with discovery and comparison. Purchases generally take place on the original marketplace.

## Important pages

- https://pcpartdeals.eu/
- https://pcpartdeals.eu/browse.html
- https://pcpartdeals.eu/guides/used-pc-parts-europe.html
- https://pcpartdeals.eu/guides/used-gpu-europe.html
- https://pcpartdeals.eu/guides/used-graphics-cards-europe.html
- https://pcpartdeals.eu/guides/cheap-gpu-europe.html
- https://pcpartdeals.eu/guides/second-hand-pc-parts-europe.html
- https://pcpartdeals.eu/guides/used-cpu-europe.html
- https://pcpartdeals.eu/guides/used-gaming-pc-parts-europe.html
- https://pcpartdeals.eu/guides/where-to-buy-used-pc-parts-in-europe.html
